name: MICHAL DUCHOWSKI
profile: Experienced manager. Experienced in the management of multidisciplinary designers teams (small and big, domestic and international), responsible for hiring, motivating, talent development, mentoring cross-functional team members, enhancing team spirit, efficiency, coaching, inspiring, team building, etc. Maintaining a high-level and diverse team culture.

Practicioner of UX and Design Thinking approach and agile methodologies – co-working, co-creation, customer-centric, based on permanent, very different research on every stage of a specific project/task - converting results into meaningful insights and further into a valuable product.
lecturer: Lecturer at the Polish Japanese Academy of Information Technology Warsaw - faculty of UX design
itsme: Working on UX/UI Design field for all types of screens - digital and tangible touchpoints
Managing the integration of AI tools into the UX design process
Actively developing new AI-powered tools and services
Upskilling team members on a wide range of AI subjects
Taking an active part in building and developing Design Systems for big global brands
Co-creating, co-working, conducting of brainstorms / workshops with an engaged team and clients
Conducting design projects based on the newest agile / human-centered / design thinking methodologies
Designing of research assumptions and its scenarios regarding current goals
Testing assumptions, concepts, and prototypes with end users (also with experts / clients)
Analyzing qualitative and quantitative results of research - converting them into useful insights
Tracking measurable parameters of projects, gathering conclusions for the future
Effective collaboration with product management, product development, and business owners
Being up to date with the newest trends and technologies (also software) - sharing this knowledge
Preparing dedicated procedures and processes due to optimizing workflow and achieving the best results
Building, developing, managing and taking care of design teams members - UX / UI / Motion / Graphic designers
Promoting of open and diverse team culture and key values like empathy, respect, curiosity

additional.label: Creativity
additional.text: I worked in a few advertising agencies in the Creative departments. Positions from Junior Art Director to Creative Director. Inventing creative ideas by myself and managing as a leader, pipelines of creative processes, was exactly what I did for a living.

additional.label: Architecture
additional.text: I'm a co-author (as an interior designer) of 4 metro stations and 1 railway station in Warsaw / Poland. A remarkable and unique experience of being part of huuuuge public projects.

bullets: Leading a team of UX Designers - all aspects
Driving the implementation and management of AI tools within UX design processes
Proactively designing and launching new AI-driven tools and services
Educating and upskilling cross-functional teams on diverse AI concepts
Leading a team of UX/UI designers (all aspects of being a leader)
Conducting and overseeing projects for global clients on a UI/UX scope
Active participation in design ops activities and building Design Systems
Building, developing, and leading a team of UX/UI designers
Actively looking for business opportunities, working on best offer preparations
Taking care of visibility and good PR of the whole team within the company
Running Digital / Web / Mobile / Creative projects for clients (from all over the world)
Conducting design workshops with clients and the team - all based on the newest agile / human-centered
Taking part in the co-building and development of OneAccenture - a global design and creation governance team
Establishing and developing a design and creative service team in Poland - the fourth design / creative hub in the world within Accenture

Conducting international team of designers (graphic / motion / UX / UI) - projects (digital communication, web, mobile) coordination, keeping eye on creative direction, functionalities, business purposes, and overall results
Leading team of designers spread out in 11 stores in Poland. Building trustful relationships in the team. Coaching, supporting, and acting in the matrix manager
Ensuring effectiveness, proper tone of voice, and consistency of IKEA communication in all touchpoints

Implementing innovations, a new way of working and new technology, e.g.: including digital communication as an indispensable part of graphic designers' work scope; developing research as a permanent manner of checking assumed goals (e.g.: eye-tracking research on Customer Guidance System effectiveness in Poland); based on the best agile / design thinking methodologies designing and implementing of Digital Wayfinders System (interactive in-store maps) in Poland; setting UX / agile / design thinking / customer-centric approach as an axis of mindset among members of the design team
Preparing a creative strategy for local and global GEMACO clients in close cooperation with 14 foreign GEMACO branches
Active participation in acquiring new clients
Management of design team - graphic / motion / UX / UI designers
Providing pieces of training for co-workers. Taking care of team spirit, self-development of team members
Responsible for the design department's budget
Managing a team of POSM designers. Being in charge of hiring, developing, setting processes, and overall results
Preparation assumptions (briefs) for designing POSM materials based on the client's goals and needs
Strict cooperation with construction and production departments and external supplier
Together with the team, co-creation, and implementation of innovative ideas in the context of market needs, customer insights, technological background, etc.
Conducting permanent surveys on customers' shopping habits
Monitoring of market background, target groups, trend sales data, etc.
Searching for innovative solutions and opportunities to expand the business
Taking care of good perception of the company in the market
Management of whole activities of several creative teams
Taking care of employee development and competencies growth
Co-creation strategy of launching and communication of brands and products
Establishing and taking care of good relationships with clients

interests: No any sports, I'm a walker (20k steps per day)

quotes.text: Life is like riding a bicycle. To keep your balance, you must keep moving.
quotes.author: Albert Einstein

quotes.text: I would never die for my beliefs because I might be wrong.
quotes.author: Bertrand Russel

quotes.text: There is nothing permanent except change
quotes.author: Heraclitus

quotes.text: Everyone has a plan until they get punched in the mouth.
quotes.author: Mike Tyson

quotes.text: I believe creativity is an inherent part of everyone
quotes.author: Kermit the Frog
